## Introduction

This report summarises website traffic to OTexts.com by country, based on Google Analytics 4 (GA4) data spanning January 2021 to January 2026. The dataset covers 236 countries and includes metrics such as views, active users, views per active user, average engagement time, and event count.


## Overview

Across all countries, OTexts.com recorded a total of **26\,437\,986** views from **2\,728\,650** active users over the period.


::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
# A tibble: 3 × 2
  Metric             Value     
  <chr>              <chr>     
1 Countries          236       
2 Total views        26,437,986
3 Total active users 2,728,650 
```


:::
:::


## Top 20 countries by views

The table below shows the 20 countries with the highest number of views, along with their active user counts and views per active user.


::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
# A tibble: 20 × 4
   Country        Views     `Active users` `Views per active user`
   <chr>          <chr>     <chr>                            <dbl>
 1 United States  5,837,205 566,943                           10.3
 2 India          1,843,071 275,698                            6.7
 3 Australia      1,479,159 75,747                            19.5
 4 United Kingdom 1,268,273 130,039                            9.8
 5 China          1,240,278 165,279                            7.5
 6 South Korea    1,055,188 180,136                            5.9

10 Italy          619,896   42,107                            14.7
11 Malaysia       555,033   36,207                            15.3
12 Netherlands    484,593   42,620                            11.4
13 Vietnam        468,425   32,035                            14.6
14 Spain          434,650   37,474                            11.6
15 Japan          432,820   66,269                             6.5
16 Mexico         420,834   33,336                            12.6

18 Singapore      407,121   48,962                             8.3
19 France         371,968   38,584                             9.6
20 Hong Kong      353,911   36,908                             9.6
```


:::
:::


## Bar chart: top 20 countries by views

The chart below shows the top 20 countries by total views, with bars coloured by continent.


::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output-display}
![](views_by_country_report_files/figure-html/top20-bar-chart-1.png){fig-alt='Horizontal bar chart of the top 20 countries by views on OTexts.com, with bars coloured by continent.' width=672}
:::
:::


The United States dominates with approximately 5\,837\,205 views — around three times that of the next country, India. Asian and European countries are well represented across the rest of the top 20, while Australia stands out as a high-traffic country relative to its population.

## Engagement

Views per active user provides a measure of how deeply visitors engage with the site. Among large countries (at least 1,000 views), Australia has notably high engagement.


::: {.cell}
::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
# A tibble: 10 × 4
   Country           Views     `Active users` `Views per active user`
   <chr>             <chr>     <chr>                            <dbl>
 1 San Marino        1,007     23                                43.8
 2 Faroe Islands     2,622     60                                43.7
 3 Greenland         1,038     32                                32.4
 4 Cape Verde        2,290     109                               21  
 5 Australia         1,479,159 75,747                            19.5
 6 Guatemala         47,057    2,453                             19.2
 7 St. Kitts & Nevis 1,071     60                                17.9
 8 Réunion           2,048     116                               17.7
 9 Nicaragua         9,928     588                               16.9
10 Portugal          236,865   14,152                            16.7
```
